Sections.Name: Account
Sections.Description: The Ubisoft account details the Uplay DRM shim presents to games. The browser login fills these in automatically; set or correct them here if needed. Stored locally only.

Options.Label: Username
Options.Description: Your Ubisoft display name (leave blank to use the name from your session).

Options.Label: Password
Options.Description: Your Ubisoft account password. Required by some games (e.g. AC4). Stored locally only; leave blank to keep the current one.
